text: Moving from the vacant, expansive corridor to this vibrant, intellectual exhibit, I feel a subtle shift inside myself. The first space evoked a sense of anticipation—emptiness charged with possibility, perhaps even a slight unease when surrounded by silence and order. Now, enveloped by bold colors and curious artifacts, I feel inspired. I am invited to contemplate creation and collaboration, the interplay between solitude and stimulation. Here, the promise of understanding—of connecting with new ideas—echoes warmly within me.
